name: craftastudio
description: Root workspace runner for CraftaStudio — frontend + backend + agents

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "frontend,backend,agents" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "node scripts/run-agents-dev.mjs"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.start: concurrently --names "frontend,backend,agents" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run start --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix backend" "node scripts/run-agents-dev.mjs"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && node scripts/install-agents-deps.mjs
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix frontend && npm run type-check --prefix backend
